clientPhone.description: Optional phone number or contact channel

timeOption.description: Selected scheduling preference mode (A: fixed hours, B: custom slots)

optionAHours.description: Number of hours requested under option A

optionBProposedSlots.description: Proposed date/time slots for option B

status.description: Latest status of the appointment request

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the request was initiated

adminNotes.description: Internal notes, remarks, and audit trails logged by the administration

ExecutiveSlot.title: ExecutiveSlot
ExecutiveSlot.description: Allocated schedule slot for a specific executive

executive.description: ID or name of the executive

appointments/{appointmentId}.description: Collection tracking all scheduled or requested corporate sessions

executive_slots/{slotId}.description: Collection tracking all confirmed appointments time intervals per executive
